sentences.arabic: أَطْلَقَ الْحَيُّ مَشْرُوعَ حَدِيقَةٍ مُشْتَرَكَةٍ لِلْخُضَرَاوَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Kvart je pokrenuo projekat zajedničkog vrta za povrće.
sentences.translationEn: The neighborhood launched a shared vegetable garden project.

sentences.arabic: تَطَوَّعَ عَشَرَةٌ مِنَ السُّكَّانِ لِلْعَمَلِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Deset stanovnika se javilo za rad u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: Ten residents volunteered to work in the garden.

sentences.translation: Zajedno sade paradajz, krastavce i luk.
sentences.translationEn: They plant tomatoes, cucumbers, and onions together.

sentences.arabic: يُوَزِّعُونَ الْمَحْصُولَ عَلَى الْعَائِلَاتِ فِي الْحَيِّ.
sentences.translationEn: They distribute the harvest to families in the neighborhood.
